name: CTEEP - Companhia de Transmissao de Energia Eletrica Paulista S.A.
summary: CTEEP √Ç¬ñ Companhia de Transmiss√É¬£o de Energia El√É¬©trica Paulista S.A. engages in the electric power transmission business in Brazil. As of February 2, 2021, it had a total installed transformation capacity of 68,386 MVA together with transmission lines of 18,786 kilometers (km); 26,074 km of circuits; and 128 substations. It operates in the states of Rio Grande do Sul, Santa Catarina, Parana, Sao Paulo, Minas Gerais, Rondonia, Mato Grosso, Mato Grosso do Sul, Goias, Tocantins, Maranhao, Piaui, Paraiba, Pernambuco, Alagoas, Espirito Santo, and Bahia.
